title: hydrocotyle dipleura
intro: Hydrocotyle dipleura, also known as Indian pennywort, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia, belonging to the family Araliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is valued for its potential health benefits, such as improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting eye health. Hydrocotyle dipleura is often prepared as an herbal supplement, available in capsule or tablet form, as well as in teas and infusions, and is also used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine preparations.
